series_metadata.series_description: The Public Records Billing Report contains the customers’ monthly fees for the processing of public records requests owed to the BWC.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan and verify images, then destroy. ; Electronic: The electronic files of the Public Records Billing Report are maintained on the I drive in an Excel spreadsheet for the Public Records Unit. Retain the Public Records Billing Report for 2 years, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
